title: Extra Large Portable Lap Desk Tray (Banksy Graffiti Monkey) Wide Multi Purpose | Handmade Large Wooden Frame, Big Beanbag Cushion Bottom | Computers, Laptops, Meals, Food | 49.8cm | XL16 Black
features: Versatile Lap Desk Use – A convenient solution for relaxing in bed or riding in a car, this laptray can be used to hold a laptop computer, food, snacks, books, and more.
Breathable, Cushioned Bottom – The underside of each lap desk pad features a soft pillow that contours to your legs to improve stability and comfort wherever you sit.
Vivid Image Quality – Underneath each scratch-resistant, slip-resistant laminate top is a bold, beautiful, and full color image that retains its stunning color and design.
Reinforced Frame – Made with wood and strengthened with stapled corners, our beanbag cushioned lap tray boasts stronger corners for improved strength, stability, and lasting durability.

Handmade Craftsmanship – We make every lap tray by hand, right here in the UK. This allows us to better control the overall quality, provide fast, responsive customer service, and ensure you’re 100% happy.
description: Yoosh Extra Large Cushion Based Lap Tray - Make it easier to use your laptop, read a book, or enjoy a snack in bed with a portable, lightweight lap desk from Yoosh. Whether you love lying in bed and watching Netflix on your laptop, working in the car while you’re traveling, or just enjoying a great breakfast in your favourite chair, the Yoosh XL Wooden Lap Tray will help make it easier no matter where you end up. Handmade with wood and boasting a larger cushioned pillow bottom, it rests easily on your legs to give you better stability no matter what you’re trying to accomplish. And with a beautiful image underneath a slip and scratch-resistant overlay, you can couple your personal style with portable convenience. Product Details: Handmade in Great Britain Cushioned Beanbag Bottom Vibrant, High-Quality Image Large Wooden Frame Reinforced Corners Colour: Black Frame Black Cushion Click ‘Add to Basket’ above now and get this premium lap desk and make it easier and more convenient to use your laptop or eat meals wherever you’re sitting.
